About Me
I am a Customer Support Specialist with 3+ years of experience handling technical, chat, and CRM-based customer interactions. I specialize in resolving complex queries, managing escalations, and ensuring high customer satisfaction through fast and effective solutions. Currently expanding into Data Analytics with Excel, SQL, and data interpretation skills.
